backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile storage, trial/standard/premium membership lifecycle, and admin controls, all gated by an access-control mixin that checks caller permissions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the AboutSection component was updated to display two side-by-side labeled images (1902 historic and current gymnasium) in the right column.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of short descriptions for every frontend source file, covering styling, components, hooks, pages, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, primary, secondary, accent, destructive, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Actuality Studio app, loading Playfair Display and Space Grotesk from Google Fonts and mounting the React app at #root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with index and membership routes, and renders the AppShell which conditionally shows the ProfileSetupModal for newly authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Two-column About section component with a left text/CTA column and a right column displaying side-by-side labeled images of McKinley Elementary School (1902 historic exterior and current gymnasium).
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: App footer displaying the copyright year, a terracotta heart icon, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the Actuality Studio logo, desktop and mobile nav links (mixing TanStack Router Links and anchor-scroll buttons), user profile display, and a Login button.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background photo, heading, and a CTA button that triggers Internet Identity login and creates a trial membership before navigating to /membership.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a Header, Footer, and a decorative SVG vine divider, rendering child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Reusable login/logout button supporting default and compact variants, using Internet Identity for authentication and clearing React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/MembershipCard.t: Displays the authenticated user's membership status, offering trial creation or NFT minting actions, with loading, error, and unauthenticated states handled.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts first-time logged-in users to enter a display name, saving it via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation before proceeding.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, exposing identity, login, clear, and login status to the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for user profile and membership operations, wrapping backend actor calls for fetching, saving, trial creation, and NFT minting.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS using Tailwind directives and sets up an autumn/spring warm color palette (terracotta, sage, gold, cream) via CSS custom properties in oklch, plus custom utility classes for gradients, glows, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, then mounts it to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page component composed of HeroSection, AboutSection, a mission statement banner, and a features grid; includes decorative SVG leaf motifs and conditionally renders a CTA based on authentication state.
frontend/src/pages/MembershipPage.tsx: Membership management page that shows the MembershipCard for authenticated users or a login prompt with Internet Identity for unauthenticated users, decorated with SVG leaf motifs.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear parameters via sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom font families, oklch-based semantic color tokens (terracotta, sage, gold, blush, cream, forest), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, existing features, and image requirements; currently describes a feature to update the AboutSection right column to display side-by-side historic and current McKinley Elementary School photos.
